zh.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam II Vicomte de Melun於大約1172年出生在法國時，他的父親Louis De Melun I21歲，母親Gisèle De Cambrai17歲。他和Aremburge d'Halluin至少有1個兒子。他去世於1220年9月22日在英國英格蘭享年49歲。

zh-hans.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam II Vicomte de Melun于大约1172年出生在法国时，他的父亲Louis De Melun I21岁，母亲Gisèle De Cambrai17岁。他和Aremburge d'Halluin至少有1个儿子。他去世于1220年9月22日在英国英格兰享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: metonymic occupational name for a producer of melons (Spanish melón, French melon).

Spanish (Melón): habitational name principally from the town of Melón in Ourense (Galicia) or Melón in Vigo (also in Galicia). This is probably a topographic name (meaning ‘altitude, rock’), a word of pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Mellon
meanings: English (Lancashire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulan in Seine-et-Oise, now known as Meulan-en-Yvelines.
Scottish (Lanarkshire; of Norman origin): variant of   Melville  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam II Vicomte de Melun was born about 1172, in France, his father, Louis De Melun I, was 21 and his mother, Gisèle De Cambrai, was 17. He had at least 1 son with Aremburge d'Halluin. He died on 22 September 1220, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam II Vicomte de Melun est né environ 1172, à France, son père, Louis De Melun I, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Gisèle De Cambrai, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Aremburge d'Halluin. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1220, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam II Vicomte de Melun um 1172 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis De Melun I 21 und seine Mutter Gisèle De Cambrai 17. Er hatte mit Aremburge d'Halluin mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 22. September 1220 im Alter von 49 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam II Vicomte de Melun è nato il circa 1172 nel Francia, il suo padre, Louis De Melun I, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Gisèle De Cambrai, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Aremburge d'Halluin. Morì il 22 settembre 1220, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Fr: フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルン
ja.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Kingd: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイ
ja.lifeSummary: Adam II Vicomte de Melunが約1172年にフランスで生まれた時，父Louis De Melun Iは21歳，母Gisèle De Cambraiは17歳であった。彼はAremburge d'Halluinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1220年9月22日にイギリスイギリスで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam II Vicomte de Melun(이)가 대략 1172년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis De Melun I(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisèle De Cambrai(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Aremburge d'Halluin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1220년 9월 22일 영국 잉글랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam II Vicomte de Melun nasceu aproximadamente 1172, em França, seu pai, Louis De Melun I, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle De Cambrai, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Aremburge d'Halluin. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1220, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam II Vicomte de Melun родился около 1172 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Louis De Melun I было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Gisèle De Cambrai, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Aremburge d'Halluin. Он умер 22 сентября 1220 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam II Vicomte de Melun nació aproximadamente 1172, en Francia, su papá, Louis De Melun I, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Gisèle De Cambrai, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Aremburge d'Halluin. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1220, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
